---
title: "Week 04"
---

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Monday (3/02)
:::

**Topics**

-   More discrete RV's
-   CDF

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_09.pdf)

**Class activity**

-   [Practice problems](class/CA_09.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Wednesday (3/04)
:::

**Topics**

-   Independence of RVs
-   Expected value

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   None!

**Class activity**

-   [Rest of proof](class/sum_binom_thm.qmd) from class

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Friday (3/06)
:::

**Topics**

-   Functions of RVs
-   Expected value properties
-   LoTUS

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_11.pdf)

**Class activity**

-   [Proof](class/expectation_sum.qmd) of expectation of a sum of RVs
-   Functions of RVs and LoTUS [practice problems](class/CA_11.pdf)
